stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are taking off on runway 09 with a SEP aeroplane at the field-length-limited take-off mass in VMC. A straight ahead departure is planned. What will be the expected, approximate obstacle clearance overhead the trees on the extended centreline?

Climb gradient: 9.0%
True airspeed: 124 kt
Headwind: 10 kt
Runway elevation: 45 ft AMSL
1 NM: 6080 ft
Height Difference = ((GD × TAS)/GS) × Gradient/100
